scripts.check:openapi: pnpm run generate:openapi && git diff --exit-code -- openapi.yaml
scripts.check:types: pnpm run generate:types && git diff --exit-code -- packages/core/src/generated
scripts.lint:go: golangci-lint run --no-config --default=none --enable govet --enable ineffassign --enable staticcheck --enable unused --enable copyloopvar --enable nilerr --enable errorlint --build-tags noui ./...
scripts.build: pnpm run generate:openapi && pnpm run generate:types && pnpm --filter spawntree-core run build && pnpm --filter spawntree-web run build && pnpm --filter spawntree-daemon run build && pnpm --filter spawntree run build
